reviews.comment:
Pasamos a los sanitarios impecables, las chicas que lo limpian muy atentas.
La atención el servicompras normal, precios normales.

(Translated by Google)
We went to the spotless restrooms; the cleaning staff were very attentive. The service at the convenience store was average, and the prices were normal.

reviews.comment:
(Translated by Google) For those traveling by car, YPF is the most recommended, especially for using the shower facilities and sleeping in the parking lot (when necessary).

They are safer and offer excellent service.

(Original)
Para aqueles que viajam de carro, o YPF é o mais recomendado, principalmente para usar os serviços de banho e para dormir no estacionamento (quando necessário).
São mais seguros e contam com atendimento de excelência.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1084216927848101404/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNwemFtdGJBEAE
